allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("R:\\Mad\\NearNeed_App\\app\\google-services.json"\); "First 6 bytes: $\($bytes[0..5] -join ', '\)"; "File length: $\($bytes.Length\)"; "Encoding check - BOM: $\(if\($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\){'UTF-8 BOM found'}elseif\($bytes[0] -eq 0xFF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xFE\){'UTF-16 LE BOM found'}else{'No BOM \(good\)'}\)")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "R:\\Mad\\NearNeed_App\\app\\google-services.json" -Raw; try { $parsed = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; "JSON valid - project_id: $\($parsed.project_info.project_id\), package: $\($parsed.client[0].client_info.android_client_info.package_name\)" } catch { "PARSE ERROR: $_" }; "Raw hex of first 20 bytes:"; [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(20,$content.Length\)\)\) | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ } | Write-Output)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("R:\\Mad\\NearNeed_App\\app\\google-services.json"\); "Total bytes: $\($bytes.Length\)"; "Last 10 bytes: $\($bytes[\($bytes.Length-10\)..\($bytes.Length-1\)] -join ', '\)"; "Last 10 bytes hex: $\(\($bytes[\($bytes.Length-10\)..\($bytes.Length-1\)] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\)")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("R:\\Mad\\NearNeed_App\\app\\google-services.json"\); $odd = @\(\); for\($i=0;$i -lt $bytes.Length;$i++\){$b=$bytes[$i]; if\($b -ne 0x0D -and $b -ne 0x0A -and $b -ne 0x20 -and $b -ne 0x09 -and \($b -lt 0x20 -or $b -gt 0x7E\)\){$odd += "byte[$i]=0x$\($b.ToString\('X2'\)\)"}}; if\($odd.Count -eq 0\){"All bytes are clean printable ASCII + CRLF/LF/TAB/SPACE"}else{$odd})
